recommendations.title: File GST appellate tribunal appeal within 30 days
recommendations.description: Initiate legal challenge against ₹50.38 Cr GST demand by filing appeal at the GST appellate tribunal by 2026-05-13, led by Head of Legal, to avoid ₹50.38 Cr penalty and potential 10.1 bps margin erosion, aligned with GRI:207-1 disclosure requirements.
recommendations.profitability_link: ₹50.38 Cr penalty avoided, ROI ~1200% capped at 500%
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Peer banks filed timely appeals to avoid penalties in similar GST disputes

recommendations.title: Commission third-party tax governance audit by Q3 FY26
recommendations.description: Engage an external auditor to conduct a comprehensive tax governance and compliance audit by 2026-09-30 to identify gaps and strengthen controls, improving GRI:207 and ESRS G1 disclosures and potentially saving ₹50-100 Cr over 3 years in avoided penalties.
recommendations.profitability_link: ₹50-100 Cr penalty risk mitigation over 3 years, ROI ~150%
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Top banks enhanced tax governance post-GST disputes to restore investor confidence

recommendations.title: Implement monthly GST compliance monitoring dashboard
recommendations.description: Develop and deploy a GST compliance dashboard by 2026-06-30 to monitor tax payments, disputes, and regulatory changes; escalate to Board if GST demand exceeds ₹10 Cr or new litigation arises, reducing risk of surprise penalties.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoid ₹10-20 Cr unexpected penalties annually, ROI ~150%
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Leading banks use real-time tax dashboards to preempt compliance risks

recommendations.title: Enhance GST-related disclosures in BRSR FY26 filing
recommendations.description: Update BRSR FY26 and Core FY26 filings by 2026-05-30 to include detailed GST risk management and contingent liabilities disclosure, led by ESG Reporting Head, to improve transparency and reduce governance scrutiny per BRSR:P6:Q14 guidelines.
recommendations.profitability_link: Improved ESG ratings may reduce fund outflow by ₹20-40 Cr annually, ROI ~200%
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Competitors improved GST risk disclosure post regulatory actions to maintain ESG scores

recommendations.title: Board-level quarterly review of tax litigation and risks
recommendations.description: Institute quarterly Board reviews starting 2026-07-15 for all tax litigation and contingent liabilities, led by CFO and Head of Legal, to ensure timely escalation and strategic decision-making per SEBI governance reporting requirements.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoid ₹50 Cr+ penalties via proactive governance, ROI ~300%
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Peer financial institutions enhanced board oversight after GST disputes to mitigate risks
